description: Catalog of Balance Sheet fields with custom As Allowed / Remarks logic. Each entry covers one field. Add new entries following the same structure as existing ones.

customized_fields.summary: JV-related A/R deducted from As Allowed
custom_logic: Amount extracted from PDF 'Partnerships and Joint Ventures' notes section
As Allowed = As Given minus extracted JV amount
Remark shows the As Given total and the JV portion separately

customized_fields.summary: JV A/R amount shown as 100% disallowed
custom_logic: As Given is populated by standard extraction if PDF contains this field — no special handling needed
As Allowed = extracted JV amount multiplied by 0
Remark written unconditionally regardless of As Given being empty

customized_fields.field: Costs & Earnings in Excess of Billings
customized_fields.summary: Remark added showing unbilled receivables amount from contract assets note
custom_logic: As Given and As Allowed formula are both correct — no change needed
Remark sourced from PDF 'Contract Assets and Liabilities' note section
Amount is 'Unbilled receivables - reimbursable contracts' for the insertion period
Table header date is split across two lines — first col date reconstructed before matching
Period matched explicitly: first col if matches, second col if matches, else None

customized_fields.summary: As Allowed set to 20% of current Marketable Securities via cross-row formula
custom_logic: As Given is populated by standard extraction if PDF contains this field — no special handling needed
As Allowed = current Marketable Securities (row 14) As Given column * 0.2
Formula written unconditionally — does not depend on As Given being populated or empty
Remarks left blank — no remark for this field

customized_fields.summary: Static remark added — As Given and As Allowed already handled correctly
custom_logic: As Given and As Allowed are correct from standard rules — no change needed
Remark is static text: 'Includes Investments'
No PDF extraction required — remark does not contain dynamic values

customized_fields.field: Billings in Excess of Cost & Earnings
customized_fields.summary: Static remark added — As Given and As Allowed already handled correctly
custom_logic: As Given and As Allowed are correct from standard rules — no change needed
Remark is static text: 'Includes Contract liabilities'
No PDF extraction required — remark does not contain dynamic values

customized_fields.summary: As Given corrected to sum of both components; Remark shows breakdown
custom_logic: PDF has two separate line items: 'Accrued salaries, wages and benefits' and 'Other accrued liabilities'
Without this, only 'Other accrued liabilities' reaches the template — the other goes UNMAPPED
Both values read from extraction_data rows by source_label pattern match in Current Liabilities section for the insertion period
As Given overwritten with sum of both components (in thousands)
As Allowed not touched — existing formula =B55*1 self-corrects once As Given is fixed
Remark: 'Includes Accrued salaries, wages and benefits $X + Other accrued liabilities $Y' (amounts comma-formatted)
Skips silently if either component value is absent for the insertion period

customized_fields.summary: Remark cleared — SpreadingRulesService writes rule_text but template has no remark for this field
custom_logic: As Given and As Allowed are correct from standard rules — no change needed
SpreadingRulesService writes rule_text 'If this includes line of credit...' because it is not equal to 'No Changes'
Template shows Remarks as empty/None for all existing periods
Remark cell set to None unconditionally to clear whatever SpreadingRulesService wrote

customized_fields.summary: As Allowed reduced by Deferred Compensation when present; Remark shows breakdown
custom_logic: Trigger: Deferred Compensation (row 66) As Allowed value present in the dynamically inserted column
DC As Given is always None — DC As Allowed is a static number set independently (never a formula from SpreadingRulesService)
If DC As Allowed is absent (None): no change — SpreadingRulesService result for OLL is correct
dc_value is read directly from DC As Allowed when it is a static number; falls back to DC As Given if DC As Allowed is a formula
As Allowed for OLL overwritten: =<as_given_letter>68*1-<as_allowed_letter>66 (cross-row formula referencing DC As Allowed cell — matches template pattern)
Remark: 'Includes Other non current liabilities $X - Deferred compensation $Y' (both amounts comma-formatted)
X = OLL As Given value; Y = dc_value (from DC As Allowed) for the insertion period

customized_fields.field: Due to Consolidated JV / Minority Interest
customized_fields.summary: As Allowed set to LLC Members Equity As Given via cross-row formula
custom_logic: As Given is always None — SpreadingRulesService skips this row entirely
Trigger: LLC Members Equity / NCI (row 82) As Given value present in the dynamically inserted column
If row 82 As Given is absent (None): skip silently — nothing written
As Allowed written as cross-row formula: =<as_given_letter>82 (references row 82 As Given of the same period column)
No remarks written for this field
Row 82 As Given is populated by standard extraction before custom rules run — no special handling needed

customized_fields.summary: Remark overridden to match template text — SpreadingRulesService writes different rule_text
custom_logic: As Given and As Allowed (=B82*0) are correct from standard rules — no change needed
SpreadingRulesService writes rule_text 'Minority Interest / Non-Controlling Interest - 100% reclassified from Equity to Long Term Liability'
Template consistently shows 'Includes Non Controlling interest (100% Reclassified from equity to long term liability)' across all periods
Remark overwritten unconditionally with the correct template text

customized_fields.summary: As Allowed and Remark set based on which disallowed components are present for the period
custom_logic: As Given is always None across all periods — SpreadingRulesService skips this row entirely
Requires jv_ar_amount from notes_data (same PDF extraction used for A/R row 15 and row 20) — skip silently if absent
Goodwill (row 36) and Intangible Assets (row 37) As Given are read from the inserted column after SpreadingRulesService runs

Condition 1 (JV only — Goodwill and Intangibles both absent): As Allowed = =-<jv_ar_amount>; Remark = 'Includes Work performed for unconsolidated partnerships and joint ventures (100% Disallowed from asset and equity)'
Condition 2 (Goodwill present, no Intangibles): As Allowed = =-<as_given_letter>36-<jv_ar_amount>; Remark includes Goodwill value and JV amount
Condition 3 (Goodwill + Intangibles both present): As Allowed = =-<as_given_letter>36-<as_given_letter>37-<jv_ar_amount>; Remark includes all three components
Goodwill and Intangibles are treated as absent when their As Given value is None or 0
Dollar amounts in remarks are comma-formatted integers matching the existing template pattern
